title: ImprovementRun
description: A record of a single execution run within the improvement pipeline, representing one phase of the lifecycle.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this pipeline run.

run_type.description: The type of pipeline phase this run represents.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this run started.

status.description: Current execution status of this run.

version.description: Schema version of this run document.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this run finished, if completed.

signals_collected.description: Optional count of signals collected during this run.

proposals_generated.description: Optional count of proposals generated during this run.

proposals_applied.description: Optional count of proposals applied during this run.

errors.description: Optional list of error messages encountered during this run.
